resources.string: Google Sign-In is not configured for this APK. Add SHA-1 5c64756a1cd541582faaf8ddb20481eeb4446e08 to Firebase, download new google-services.json, rebuild. See FIREBASE_GOOGLE_SIGNIN.md.
Sign-in cancelled. Tap SIGN IN again and choose your Google account.
Network error during sign-in. Check connection and try again.
Google did not return an ID token. Add this APK\'s SHA-1 in Firebase (see FIREBASE_GOOGLE_SIGNIN.md).
